headline_seed: NEW: The Trump administration is discarding its shock-and-awe publicity tactics on immigration after mass backlash. The White House has become allergic to the edgy memes, embedded camera crews and cosplaying officials that dominated Kristi Noem's tenure.
draft_text:
Axios reports the Trump administration is pulling back from high-profile immigration enforcement tactics tied to former DHS Secretary Kristi Noem, shifting toward quieter operations.

reported by Axios, not yet confirmed elsewhere.
